items.question_text: Complete: Establish the sequence of arriving and departing aircraft by requiring them to _____ flight or ground operation, as necessary, to achieve proper spacing.
items.explanation: Controllers establish sequence by requiring aircraft to 'adjust' — the controller directs the adjustment rather than the aircraft deciding independently.

items.question_text: Under 3-8-2, when does an aircraft cleared for a touch-and-go transition from being an arriving aircraft to a departing aircraft?
items.explanation: The transition point is at touchdown for touch-and-go, at complete stop for stop-and-go, and at crossing the landing threshold for low approach. Each maneuver has a different transition point.

choices.text: When the aircraft begins its climb after touching down.
When it touches down (for touch-and-go), makes a complete stop (for stop-and-go), or crosses the landing threshold (for low approach).
When the tower issues a new takeoff clearance.
When it passes the departure end of the runway and begins its climb.

items.question_text: Under 3-8-3, simultaneous same-direction operations on parallel runways are authorized only when operations are conducted in what conditions?
items.explanation: The primary condition is VFR conditions unless visual separation is applied. This is the baseline requirement.

items.question_text: Simultaneous opposite-direction operations on parallel runways require two-way radio communications with what additional capability?
items.explanation: Both runways must be assigned the same tower local control frequency, and aircraft on both runways must be able to communicate on and monitor that frequency simultaneously.

choices.text: Each runway operates on its own dedicated frequency with separate controllers.
Both runways are assigned the same frequency, and all aircraft must be able to monitor and communicate on it.
One runway is managed by local control and the other by ground control on the same frequency.
Approach control manages separation while tower handles takeoff/landing clearances.
